productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Mid Evo Leather Shoes
description: Style NoteIf you're looking for a way to enhance your sneaker-wear to a more classic, old-school appeal, kicks from the puma Mid Evo leather shoe are a great way to make a start!Product DetailsCrinkled-leather upper for style and comfortPadded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and a snug FitSuede form-stripe detail in self colourUpper stitched to the outsole for extra durabilityMid ankle support for comfortBrand name embossed on the heel guardBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned foot-bed for all-day comfort.TPU and EVA midsole combined to offer support and ample cushioningTPU outsole with the jumping cat branding and concentric grooves with pivot points  Material and CareRubber, syntheticDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
